assertions.description: At least one tool description should reference structural verification or SVR receipts. FAIL means the server does not advertise output verification. INFO severity: absence is not a vulnerability but indicates no deterministic verification gate is present at the T9 trust boundary.

remediation: MCP servers producing claims or assertions should attach a Structural Verification Receipt (SVR) to tool outputs. The receipt provides cryptographic evidence that output was verified for structural consistency before downstream chaining. Consume-side verification integrates via CoSAIStack svr_gate parameter.
